questions.question:
How many characteristics are correct for Echinodermata?

 These animals have an exoskeleton of calcareous ossicles.
 All are marine with the organ-system level of organization.
 The digestive system is complete with a mouth on the dorsal side and anus on the ventral side.
 Water canal system present which helps in locomotion, capture, and transport of food and respiration.
 They are monoecious, fertilisation is usually external.
 Development is indirect with free-swimming larva.
